name: lvlokkie-skills-marketplace
description: Ivan's universal agent skills marketplace: vendor-neutral skills packaged for Claude Code and portable to Hermes/Codex.

plugins.name: general
plugins.description: General-purpose agent skills that do not belong to a narrower domain category.

plugins.name: skill-management
plugins.description: Skills for managing this marketplace's skill lifecycle, category plugins, package indexes, dependency gates, and publish audits.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Marketing and paid-acquisition operations skills for campaign setup, audit, reporting, lead routing, Avito feed checks, and MCP-assisted optimization.

plugins.name: business-docs
plugins.description: Business document formation skills for core business briefs, business plans, financial model specifications, and coherent venture document suites.

plugins.name: in-progress
plugins.description: Manual-only draft skills for evaluation before promotion; not stable public workflows.
